threats.title: Microsoft Details Windows Clipper Malware Campaign Using USB LNK Worm and Tor-Based C2
threats.summary: Microsoft has disclosed details of a Windows-based cryptocurrency clipper campaign that has targeted users since February 2026. threats.title: DragonForce Hackers Abuse Microsoft Teams Relays to Hide Backdoor.Turn C2 Traffic
threats.summary: Threat actors associated with the DragonForce ransomware have been observed using a custom Go-based remote access trojan (RAT) called Backdoor.Turn to conceal command-and-control (C2) traffic inside Microsoft Teams relay infrastructure.
